content: Both Self-Refine and Reflexion can be combined to form a two-tier autonomous self-improvement system for LLMs, where lightweight Self-Refine handles immediate low-stakes output polishing, and memory-augmented Reflexion accumulates cross-task reflection patterns to fix systemic, recurring flaws that single-iteration self-feedback cannot catch. This division of labor eliminates the tradeoff between quick refinement speed and long-term capability growth that plagues current standalone self-feedback methods.
